preauth.err_missing_name: Enter the name on the card

credit.how_it_works_body: You choose a <1>maximum amount</1> you're willing to bid up to. We pre-authorise the buyer's fee on your card ({{pct}}%, min. €{{min}}, max. €{{max}}). Then you can bid freely up to this limit <1>without new card transactions</1>. If you get outbid — the amount is fully released.
credit.preauth_hint: Blocked on your card now. Only charged if you win the auction.
credit.err_invalid_card: Please enter a valid card number
credit.release_confirm: Are you sure you want to release the credit? You'll need to re-authorise for future bids.

how_it_works.intro_body: {{brand}} is a curated online car auction platform — with editorial review, 60+ photos per car and full price transparency.
how_it_works.step_01_d: Create a free account. Before your first bid you confirm your email and add a valid payment card — no ID documents required.
how_it_works.step_02_d: Every car gets a 60+ photo report, an independent technical check and full VIN decoding.
how_it_works.step_03_d: A seven-day online auction. The last 2 minutes auto-extend on any new bid.
how_it_works.step_04_d: We connect the winner with the seller. Help with payment, shipping and registration — all in one place.
how_it_works.fee_buyer_body: Buyer's premium on winning bid. {{pct}}% pre-authorization is held on every bid and charged as commission upon winning.
how_it_works.fee_seller_body: Free listing, approval, promotion and closing — regardless of the auction's outcome.
how_it_works.fee_failed_body: Zero fee if the reserve isn't met or the deal is declined.

bidding_logic.title: How bidding actually works
bidding_logic.intro: Every auction is a binding transaction between seller and winner. Here's what happens step-by-step — from the first bid to settlement.
bidding_logic.b1_t: Email and card before your first bid
bidding_logic.b1_d: We require only a verified email and a valid payment card. No ID documents, no bureaucracy — the card acts as „skin in the game“ that protects the community from fake bids and spam.
bidding_logic.b2_d: Each time you bid, we hold {{pct}}% of your bid amount (min. €{{feeMin}}, max. €{{feeMax}}) on your card. This is NOT a payment — the money stays yours and is released automatically if you get outbid.
bidding_logic.b3_d: You can authorise your maximum once and then bid freely up to that limit without new card transactions. The credit can only be raised to a higher number. If you're outbid it's released in full. You can release it yourself with one confirmation.
bidding_logic.b4_d: If a new bid is placed in the final 2 minutes, the timer is extended by another 2 minutes. This defeats sniping and gives everyone an equal chance.
bidding_logic.b5_d: A reserve is a hidden minimum price below which the seller isn't obliged to sell. „No-reserve" auctions sell to the highest bid. „With reserve" — if the reserve isn't met, the auction moves to direct negotiation.
bidding_logic.b6_t: Negotiation if the reserve isn't met
bidding_logic.b6_d: If the reserve isn't met, we open a 72-hour window (3 × 24 hours) for direct negotiation between the seller and the highest bidder. The seller can accept the bid or make a counter-offer. If they agree — the deal closes; if not — the auction closes without a buyer.
bidding_logic.b7_d: Every bid is irrevocable and legally binding. Winning means you commit to completing the transaction. Bids can only be retracted by our team and only when a technical error is proven.
bidding_logic.b8_d: When you win, the pre-authorised amount is captured as a real buyer's fee payment to {{brand}}. We then connect you directly with the seller — the car payment itself happens between the two of you (bank transfer or escrow).

cta.cta_subtitle: Create an account and get new listings before anyone else.

landing.how_it_works_desc: Four steps from signing up to handing the keys to the new owner.

steps.s1_desc: Create a free account in a minute. A verified email and valid card are all you need before your first bid.
steps.s2_desc: Full photo report, service history, VIN check and independent technical report.
steps.s3_desc: Online, real-time, with anti-snipe — the last 2 minutes extend the auction.
steps.s4_desc: Direct contact with the seller, transport, registration and completion help.

seller.promote_description: Ask a moderator to mark the listing as Featured — it will appear on the homepage.
seller.text_change_description: Request a title or description edit — a moderator will review and apply.
seller.reorder_description: Drag photos to change their order. The first photo is the cover.
seller.request_sent: Request sent. You'll be notified after moderator decision.

sell.hero_subtitle: Fill in the details below. Our team will review the submission, prepare an editorial feature and launch the auction within 10 days.
sell.import_description: We'll auto-load make, model, year, mileage, fuel, colour, description and photos. You set the starting bid and reserve yourself.
sell.photo_note: After approval, our team will arrange a professional photo shoot.
sell.success_body: Our editorial team will review the car and get in touch within 48 hours.
sell.err_contacts: Please enter a contact email and phone.
sell.err_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.

form.title: Title
form.title_placeholder: E.g. Audi RS6 Avant Performance — Nardo Grey
form.no_reserve_label: No reserve (sells to the highest bidder)
form.vin: VIN number (optional, visible only to bidders)
form.contact_hint: Our team will use this to validate the listing and schedule viewings. Phone and email will not be public.
form.photos_hint: Please upload all required photos: min. 8 exterior, 4 wheels (one each), 1 front bumper, 4 interior. The first exterior photo is the cover.
form.exterior_helper: Photos from all sides of the car
form.wheels_helper: One photo of each wheel (4 total)
form.description_placeholder: Tell the story of the car, its options and condition.
